products.title: Serpent's Embrace Money Bowl
products.descriptionHtml:
You know that one décor piece that instantly makes a space look rich and powerful? This is exactly that.

The Serpent's Embrace Money Bowl is made for people who don't want basic décor. Its bold, serpent-inspired design gives the bowl a mysterious, royal, and meaningful presence. The serpent has long symbolised protection, transformation, wisdom, and hidden strength — making it perfect for spaces where you want style with purpose.

What makes it special is the craftsmanship. Every piece is developed through in-house manufacturing after extensive research and finishing trials, so each bowl carries that polished, premium, well-finished look.

Made with A-grade premium resin and carefully blended pigments, it wears a rich golden finish that feels luxurious, aesthetic, and timeless. The detailed serpent texture coiling around the bowl adds depth and character, letting it stand out as a stylish piece of home or office décor.

How to style it:

  • Keep coins, crystals, keys, jewellery, dry flowers, or small essentials within reach
  • Place it on your work desk, cash counter, or office table as a prosperity accent
  • Style it on a console, shelf, or living room corner as a statement centrepiece

A handcrafted money bowl for those who like their décor to feel bold, premium, and full of meaning.

products.title: Wise Owl Money Bowl — Handcrafted Golden Resin Décor

The owl has long been seen as a symbol of wisdom, awareness, protection and smart decisions. This money bowl carries that same energy into your space — making it perfect for anyone who wants their home, office, cash counter or work desk to feel more thoughtful, premium and grounded.

What makes it special

It is not just the design — it is the work behind it. The Wise Owl Money Bowl is developed through in-house manufacturing after extensive research, finishing trials and detailing work to achieve a clean, polished and premium look.

  • A-grade premium resin with carefully blended pigments for a rich, even finish.
  • Warm golden tone that feels luxurious, aesthetic and timeless.
  • Owl-inspired detailing — sculpted eyes, feather-tuft ears and a fan of fine ridges inside the bowl for a heritage-style charm that still reads modern.
  • Handcrafted and finished so every piece carries its own quiet character.

How to use it

Keep coins, crystals, keys, jewellery, dry flowers or small everyday essentials — or simply place it as a statement home or office décor piece. Its wise owl design makes it ideal for spaces where you want to invite clarity, protection, prosperity and good decision-making energy.

A handcrafted money bowl for those who love décor that looks premium, feels meaningful, and quietly adds a smarter touch to the space.

products.descriptionHtml:

Introducing India’s First Fermentation-Based Rice Hair Mist — the most viral Phus Phus Hair Mist, revolutionizing the haircare industry. Each bottle is fermented for over 30 days, allowing the actives to mature, strengthen, and deeply nourish the scalp for visible hair growth results.

For centuries, fermented rice water has been celebrated as a natural remedy for long, strong, and healthy hair. We elevated this ancient tradition by blending it with Coffee, Bhringraj, and Amla — ingredients known to support hair regrowth, scalp nourishment, and reduced hair fall.

A lightweight, leave-in overnight mist that targets hair fall, strengthens roots, improves hair density, and promotes faster, healthier regrowth — all without oiliness or stickiness.

Nuskhe by Paras Ayurvedic Overnight Hair Growth Rice Mist has already become a nationwide sensation — a phus-phus ritual that people swear by for real, visible results within just a few weeks of consistent use.

Experience the new revolution in haircare — simple to use, deeply effective, and rooted in Ayurveda.

✱ Note: Every scalp is unique. Test on a small patch before full application.

Each word holds deep spiritual vibration:

ॐ (Om) – The universal cosmic sound, symbol of divine energy and spiritual awakening.

ऐं (Aim) – Associated with wisdom, clarity, learning, and focused thought.

ह्रीं (Hreem) – A powerful beej mantra linked with divine protection, inner strength, and spiritual energy.

हनुमते (Hanumate) – A sacred invocation to Lord Hanuman, known for courage, loyalty, power, and protection.

रामदूताय (Ramdootaya) – Refers to Hanuman Ji as the divine messenger of Lord Ram, representing devotion, service, and righteous action.

नमः (Namah) – A gesture of surrender, respect, gratitude, and faith.

Together, this mantra signifies divine protection, courage, fearlessness, mental strength, and removal of negative energy. Handcrafted by India’s biggest crystal brand.

products.title: Studd Muffyn BLUE BOUNCE BOBA CREAM

Gently massage until the boba capsules blend completely into the cream. For external use only. In case of any irritation or allergy, discontinue use immediately.

products.title: Selenite Coaster
products.descriptionHtml:
Selenite coasters are not only aesthetically pleasing but also serve a functional purpose in the realm of crystal healing. Made from 100% natural selenite, these coasters are known for their ability to cleanse, charge, and enhance the energies of other crystals placed upon them.

Selenite is a powerful crystal known for its unique recharging and cleansing properties, making it a popular choice among crystal enthusiasts and practitioners of holistic healing.

Selenite is a form of gypsum that is typically transparent or translucent, often exhibiting a pearly white glow. Its name is derived from the Greek word for moon, selene, due to its luminous appearance. This crystal is celebrated for its ability to cleanse and recharge other crystals, as well as for its calming and purifying energy.

products.title: Selenite Coaster ( Pack of 2 )
products.descriptionHtml:
Selenite coasters are not only aesthetically pleasing but also serve a functional purpose in the realm of crystal healing. Made from 100% natural selenite, these coasters are known for their ability to cleanse, charge, and enhance the energies of other crystals placed upon them.

Selenite is a powerful crystal known for its unique recharging and cleansing properties, making it a popular choice among crystal enthusiasts and practitioners of holistic healing.

Selenite is a form of gypsum that is typically transparent or translucent, often exhibiting a pearly white glow. Its name is derived from the Greek word for moon, selene, due to its luminous appearance. This crystal is celebrated for its ability to cleanse and recharge other crystals, as well as for its calming and purifying energy.

products.descriptionHtml:
Step into the mystical world of Sulemani Hakik, a mesmerizing crystal believed to hold supernatural secrets and mystical energies.

Sulemani Hakik, commonly referred to as Black Agate, holds a distinguished position among gemstones due to its illustrious history and profound metaphysical attributes. Originating from Sulemania, a city located in contemporary Iraq, this gem is a variant of Agate, distinguished by its intense black or brown hue adorned with striking white bands or stripes.

It further is known for killing negativity and enhance spiritual clarity, making it a cherished talisman among those who seek balance and enlightenment. Embrace the enchantment of Sulemani Hakik Pendant and unlock the hidden mysteries of the universe.

That’s where this combo fits in 💗

The Rose Quartz & Opalite Bracelet Combo isn’t something you have to “use” in a specific way. It’s just something you wear—and over time, it starts feeling like part of your day.

Rose Quartz has that calm, comforting feel. It’s often linked with emotional balance and a more gentle mindset. Opalite, on the other hand, feels lighter—like it smooths things out a bit when your thoughts feel cluttered or heavy.

You can wear both together when the day feels overwhelming. Or just pick one, depending on how you’re feeling. There’s no fixed way to do it.

The look is simple—soft pink with a subtle glow. Nothing loud, nothing complicated. It goes with everything, and more importantly, it doesn’t feel like “extra.”

It just sits there. Quietly doing its thing.

Why You’ll Like It 😍

💗 Two bracelets, two moods—wear them your way

😌 Helps you feel a little calmer on busy days

🌸 Keeps things from feeling too heavy or overwhelming

✨ Clean, soft look that works with anything

🔆 Not for special occasions—built for everyday life

products.title: Varanasi I Banarasi Silk Saree I Hot Pink
products.descriptionHtml:
Drape around the rich tapestry of cultural legacy with panache and style with the all-new saree named 'Varanasi', Hot Pink in color with copper-bold motifs, and Shocking Pink pallu. 

Weaving the threads of tradition into a timeless expression of grace, this saree is layered in luxurious Softy fabric with Banarasi jari pallu. Widely popular in Delhi, UP, Banaras, and South India, it is your perfect pick for special occasions, weddings, and festive celebrations. Furthermore, the intricate loom designs, fine weaving, and pure dye are made through the bonafide and authentic machine/process called Jacquard. 

Varanasi's notable contribution to India's cultural array is its exquisite sarees. The Banarasi sarees showcase a seamless blend of tradition and artistry, with motifs inspired by nature, Mughal designs, and religious symbols. Renowned for their fine craftsmanship and timelessness, Varanasi sarees hold a special place in the world of Indian traditional attire. Woven with intricate patterns, often featuring gold or silver zari (metallic thread) work, these sarees are a symbol of opulence.
